name: Yang Lu
summary: AI/ML Engineer with 7 years of software development experience. Built and deployed LLM-powered applications end-to-end: RAG pipelines with semantic search, multi-model evaluation toolkits, and agent frameworks (LangGraph, MCP). 10 open-source PRs to NousResearch/hermes-agent with verifiable public output. Combines production backend engineering (Java, Python, SQL) with applied AI systems. TN-eligible for US roles.

experience.title: Independent AI Engineer — Open Source & R&D
bullets: Engineered a RAG chatbot with multi-step agentic reasoning, semantic search (vector DB embeddings), and an LLM-as-judge evaluation pipeline measuring relevance and latency across 3+ model providers; deployed to HuggingFace Spaces.
Created open-source LLM evaluation toolkit with async parallel judging across multiple LLM providers, relevance scoring, and latency benchmarking — automated via GitHub Actions CI/CD with Docker.
Submitted 10 open-source PRs to NousResearch/hermes-agent: gateway dead-letter queues, 429 exponential backoff with reconnect replay, and CJK search tokenization.
Built vector search infrastructure using Chroma for semantic document retrieval and LLM memory in agentic RAG workflows — supporting JD-aware matching and contextual reranking.

Applied AI-accelerated engineering practices using Copilot, Claude, and IDE agents to speed design, implementation, testing, and refactoring — established prompt-to-code workflows with review discipline for secure, traceable changes.

experience.title: Full-Stack Developer
bullets: Managed Open edX LMS deployment on Docker Compose, ensuring reliable platform uptime for education delivery.
Worked with existing PostgreSQL schema and data persistence in education tools, supporting student-facing workflows.

experience.title: Career Break
bullets: Career pause following COVID-19 disruption; self-directed learning in full-stack development, Python, and modern software engineering fundamentals.

experience.title: Back-End Developer
bullets: Built multithreaded Java batch pipelines processing 150K listings/day via cron, pushing to ElasticSearch with automated cleanup.
Improved photo download times by 50x by switching from FTP to REST; saved 1TB+ disk space with automated cleanup.
Led code reviews for junior engineers and wrote technical documentation.

projects.title: AI Agent Infrastructure and Reliability
projects.subtitle: Python, Hermes Agent Framework (NousResearch)
bullets: Submitted 10 open-source PRs to NousResearch/hermes-agent: gateway dead-letter queues, 429 exponential backoff with reconnect replay, and CJK search tokenization.

projects.title: RAG Agent with LangGraph and MCP
projects.subtitle: LangChain, LangGraph, Chroma, HuggingFace Spaces
bullets: Built a JD-aware RAG system with custom job-link routing (?j=HASH params), semantic search over stored JDs, and match scoring — deployed to HuggingFace Spaces and Streamlit Cloud (github.com/xyanglu/resume-agent).

projects.title: LLM Eval Toolkit
projects.subtitle: Python, httpx/asyncio, OpenRouter API
bullets: Open-source multi-model LLM evaluation toolkit — async parallel scoring with LLM-as-judge relevance assessment and latency metrics (github.com/xyanglu/llm-eval-toolkit).

education.degree: Bachelor of Computing – Teradata Scholarship | Certifications: HuggingFace MCP (10/2025), DeepLearning.ai Data Engineering (06/2025)
